dialogos.texto_en: I'm full...\nMaybe I ate too much.
That was delicious though.
Yeah, I'm satisfied\nbecause I was able to eat a lot of Okinawan food today.
I wonder if you're satisfied too, Itsuki?\nYou were really looking forward to this trip.
Ah, yeah, you're right.
So, what should we do now?\nIt's too early to go back to our rooms and sleep.
But it's not really a good time\nfor sightseeing either.
Well, how about going to the lounge?\nI've been looking forward to seeing the night view\nfrom that room since we arrived.
That's a good idea, I agree.
Um, I'll pass.\nI'm a little tired,\nso I'm gonna head back to my room.
Huh?
Are you okay? Are you feeling unwell?
No, I just got a little too excited.\nTraveling can be overwhelming\nwhen you're too excited, you know.
Then, let me escort you to your room.
No, it's okay.\nReally, I'm just tired.
But%p-2;――
Please enjoy the night view, everyone.\nGood night.
She left.
Hmmm.\nShe was saying all that, but I'll go check on her.
Can I come with you? I'm worried about Itsuki-san.
Thank you, Raiha-chan.
(It really didn't seem like she was unwell,\n but I don't know...)
Itsuki, was she really just tired?
She didn't seem like it.
Maybe she just wanted to be alone?
There was a certain atmosphere around her\nthat seemed to push people away.
Hey, Fu-kun.\nWhat did you think of Itsuki today?
...The same as you guys.\nShe seemed oddly high-strung,\nand when it came to me...
Really enthusiastic?
...Yeah, you could say that.
Not that I don't like it or anything.\nI just feel like it's not very Itsuki-like.
Yeah, I know what you mean.\nNormally, Itsuki-chan wouldn't\nbe all over Fu-kun in public like this.
All over me? I mean, we were close, but...
Well, Itsuki-chan is a girl in love, right?\nMaybe she's just excited to be on a trip\nwith the person she likes.
C-could that be it?
I don't think it's impossible.
Perhaps because she's usually so serious,\nshe ends up letting loose in different ways.
Itsuki is not immune to falling in love\nin the first place.\nShe might have just lost control of herself.
...That's a convincing argument.
It's not just Itsuki-chan who's inexperienced\nand doesn't have immunity to love, you know.
Ooh...
(I don't have a response.\n I don't understand things like being romantic\n or having a sense of distance either.)
Well, I guess I'll have to be the big sister\nand help out my little sister,\nwho's getting a little carried away.
Oh jeez.\nShe's truly such a handful.
I feel like I should say sorry or something...
Stop apologizing and reflect on your actions.
You've been dating Itsuki for almost six months now,\nright? During that time, you haven't really done\nanything romantic with her, have you?
...Yeah.
I understand that there were exams and everything,\nbut you have to take the lead with that girl, Fu-kun.
Alright? This is just a one-time thing.\nAfter this, what happens between you two isn't my problem.
I understand. Thank you, Nino.
Really, no need to thank me.
I'm just gonna say this,\nbut it's just cause Nino's worried about you two.
WHA! Miku!!
Oh, come on! This conversation is over!\nLet's go to the lounge already!
There's no need to be embarrassed.
That's what makes her so cute.
(It's at times like these that I realize...\n it's all thanks to these guys\n that we're where we are now%p-2;――%p;)
(Itsuki and I are really happy, aren't we.)
